generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that mandatory service could actually strengthen our national security while promoting civic responsibility? Countries with conscription systems consistently show higher public preparedness and stronger deterrence capabilities. It's not just about the military - it's about building a more engaged and resilient society. #NationalSecurity #CivicDuty
